response.justification: Candidate has approximately 14-15 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, with demonstrated craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD), open-source leadership (GISCollective), and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role. However, the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud-AI strategic leadership — the resume shows only ~1 year of AI-adjacent work, no published AI products, no advanced AI degree, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and no track record of engineering leadership at the scale required for a Principal/Director IC position.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored OSS testing tools
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source GIS platform used in production
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise — only recent agent-tooling exposure, no shipped AI products or platforms
No evidence of Director/Principal-level strategic influence, customer advisory work, or org-wide technical leadership
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK usage; lacks deep cloud-platform strategy or architecture credentials

key_factors.factor: Insufficient seniority signals for Director-level IC role
Strong engineering craftsmanship and OSS founding experience
